scripts.build:release: npm run clean:metro && cd mobile\android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease --stacktrace
scripts.build:release:clean: npm run clean:metro && npm run clean:android && cd mobile\android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease --stacktrace
scripts.deploy:apk: copy mobile\android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\framestudio.apk web\public\download\FrameStudio-v1.0.apk && echo APK deployed to website
